title: Harnesskit Team Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating Harnesskit team definition files — named groupings of agents for specific workflows.

team.description: Team definition containing agent composition and behavior settings.

description.description: Brief description of the team's focus and capabilities.

icon.description: Emoji or icon representing this team.

spec.description: Which spec this team belongs to. Must match a loaded spec name.

agents.description: Agent IDs to include in this team. Use '*' for all agents in the spec.

purpose.description: Detailed purpose description explaining when and why to use this team.

when_to_use.description: Short guidance on the scenarios where this team is the best fit.

party_mode.description: Configuration for multi-agent collaboration within a single turn.

enabled.description: Whether multiple agents can participate in a single turn.

max_agents_per_turn.description: Maximum number of agents that can contribute in a single turn.
